item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 110800Z AUTO 35006KT 310V040 9999 -RA BKN007 OVC070 11/10 Q1008 TEMPO 4000 -RADZ BECMG BKN012
🟡 TAF LFOT 110500Z 1106/1206 23005KT 6000 -RA BKN006 TEMPO 1106/1109 4000 -RADZ BKN003 BECMG 1107/1110 01007KT 9999 NSW BKN012 BECMG 1111/1114 SCT030
